assigned.title: Group Assignment
assigned.assigned_to: You have been assigned to level group

reading.translation_hint: Hover over or click a highlighted word to see its translation here.
reading.hover_hint: Hover over highlighted words to see translation.

alertness1.question: This is an alertness check. To show you are reading carefully, please choose the second option (Option B) below.

alertness2.question: Attention check: please select the fourth option (Option D) from the choices below to confirm you are paying attention.

survey.per_task_desc: Please answer the following questions about your reading experience with this text.
survey.post_study_desc: Please answer the following final summary questions.

blocks.a1: How would you rate your overall experience reading this text?
blocks.a2: How mentally demanding was the task?
blocks.a3: How physically demanding was the task?
blocks.a4: How hurried or rushed was the pace of the task?
blocks.a5: How successful do you think you were in accomplishing the task?
blocks.a6: How hard did you have to work to accomplish your performance?
blocks.a7: How insecure, discouraged, irritated, stressed, or annoyed were you during the task?
blocks.a8: I could recognize the key points in the passage.
blocks.a9: I could recognize how the key points are supported by additional detail in the passage.
blocks.b10: The system's choice of what to gray out and what to keep at full weight made sense to me.
blocks.b11: I think I know why certain words were lighter than others.
blocks.b12: I found it helpful that certain words were lighter than others.
blocks.b13: The different levels of gray helped me see the relationships between parts of sentences.
blocks.b14: I understood why some words were highlighted.
blocks.b15: The translations helped without interrupting my reading.
blocks.b16: The highlighted words matched the words I found difficult.
blocks.b17: I would use this system when reading academic English.
blocks.b18: The system made me too dependent on translation.
blocks.c19: The shortened (skimmed) version preserved enough of the meaning.

post.use_system: I would like to use [XXX] to read online texts that interest me in the future.
post.ranking: Which version did you find more helpful for answering the comprehension questions?
post.like_most: What did you like most about the version you found most helpful?
post.missing_features: Were there any features missing that you'd like to see?

attention.check1: This is an attention check - to show you are reading carefully, please select 'Strongly Agree' for this question.
attention.check2: To ensure the system is working properly, please select the number '1' ('Very Low' or equivalent) for this question.
attention.check3: Please select 'Never' for this question to show you read it in full.

demographics.title: Demographics Form
demographics.desc: Please fill out the final background information questions.
demographics.reads_academic_english: Frequency of Academic Reading in English

pre_reading.title: Pre-Reading
pre_reading.prior_exposure: Before reading, how familiar were you with this topic?
